title: Primal World
description: Primal World is a mod focused in bringing back to life dinosaurs and add new resources and machines
body: Get ready for a prehistoric thrill with PrimalWorld! Unearth a lost world where mighty dinosaurs roam the Minecraft landscape once more! Discover new resources, tame wild animals, cultivate exotic plants, and explore the new structures, all seamlessly woven into your beloved vanilla style. Embrace the past and survive the future!
